findings.title: Ralph loop extractor module is extremely large
findings.description: ralph_loop_extractor.py is ~960 lines, which increases cognitive load and raises risk of regressions when modifying extraction logic.
findings.recommendation: Split the module into smaller components (OCR orchestration, quality scoring, AI extraction, retries) and add unit tests per component.
findings.impact: Potential degradation of reliability or security posture if left unaddressed.

cross_references.reason: Large parser module impacts both quality and maintainability.
